feed.title: Open Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Open Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Developing sociolinguistic evaluative competence: the case of French WH- interrogatives
entry.summary: Authors: Gabriel Thiberge, Heather Burnett, Barbara Hemforth DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opli-2025-0072

entry.summary: Authors: Jimmy van Rijt, Mari Nygård DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opli-2025-0076

entry.title: Sign languages of the Soviet Union: a comparison of Georgian, Russian, and Tajik Sign Languages

entry.title: Large language models as first-pass filters for corpus annotation: semantic disambiguation of Galicianpobo
A minimalist inquiry into null subjects in child early grammar
Different languages, different landscapes? Exploring linguistic differences in landscape conceptualizations
entry.summary: Authors: Přemysl Mácha, Terhi Ainiala, Urszula Bijak, Alina Bughesiu, Ivana Crljenko, Oliviu Felecan, Matjaž Geršič, Veronika Gondeková, Michaela Koščová, Tiina Laansalu, Ján Mačutek, Sanda Rapa, Katalin Reszegi, Pavel Skorupa, Ene Vainik, Maya Vlahova-Angelova, Maria Vrachionidou, Halyna Zymovets DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opli-2025-0081

entry.title: Modeling cross-linguistic variation in phonological grain size via wordlikeness judgments
entry.summary: Authors: Tsung-Ying Chen, James Myers DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/opli-2025-0085

entry.title: Terminological problems in a Hungarian language consulting service

entry.title: Can gesture help? Investigating the potential for transfer in the L2M2 acquisition of a sign language

entry.title: Recurrent head movements in DGS and spoken German
